Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.chzzk

Class ChzzkChatBuilder

java.lang.Object
io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.chzzk.ChzzkChatBuilder
public class ChzzkChatBuilder extends Object
Builder class for creating ChzzkChat instances.
Since:
1.0.0
